category_sources: source_facts.description says portable low-level networking library; official GitHub README says libdnet provides a portable interface to low-level networking routines.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is libdnet; official GitHub repository title and README use libdnet.
docs_sources: No dedicated docs site found in official sources; official GitHub README is the best documentation surface and describes APIs, reporting issues, and project scope.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/ofalk/libdnet, so repo was not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables dnet/dnet-config; official README lists address, ARP, route, firewall, interface, tunnelling, raw IP, and Ethernet routines.
